working: _obsidianSyncDebounce set — prevents chokidar re-fire loops when patching files
syncObsidianFile: skips MOC/, INDEX.md, Notes/ at top
findRelatedVaultNotes(ownPath, title, category) — keyword scan of vault root + Brain/ subdirs
patchObsidianRelated(filePath, titles) — adds [[backlinks]] to Related section of new note
patchObsidianSeeAlso(filePath, title) — appends See also: [[title]] to related notes
updateCategoryMOC(category) — writes MOC/[category].md, entries newest-first, max 50
updateObsidianIndex() — prepends category counts + [[MOC/cat]] links to INDEX.md
Enrichment fires via setImmediate after INSERT path only (not updates)
partial: BUILD 2/3: feedback_patterns and chart_history tables still need SQL in Supabase
next: Run SQL in Supabase dashboard for feedback_patterns and chart_history tables
notes: Backlinks enrich compounding wiki: every new Obsidian entry gets Related links, existing notes get See also, category MOC updated, INDEX.md updated. Debounce prevents infinite chokidar loops.
